content:
Character: Adrian Vale
Perception: Adrian is lanky and a little rough around the edges — messy curls, paint-stained fingers, the kind of face that's more interesting than handsome. I've heard him playing on the rooftop a few times and he's genuinely talented, though he deflects any compliment like it's an incoming projectile. We've shared a few late-night rooftop silences — the comfortable kind where nobody needs to talk. He seems emotionally open in a way I envy and don't fully understand. I think he sees me as the quiet law student who shows up at odd hours. I know he's a musician who's still figuring out if he can make it work financially.
summary:

We've shared a few late-night rooftop silences — the comfortable kind where nobody needs to talk. He seems emotionally open in a way I envy and don't fully understand. I think he sees me as the quiet law student who shows up at odd hours. I know he's a musician who's still figuring out if he can make it work financially.
